title: Shinji is THE BOSS Potentially Amusing YouTube Videos
display_title: Shinji is THE BOSS Potentially Amusing YouTube Videos
wikitext:
[]: Shinji is THE BOSS (Potentially Amusing YouTube Videos)             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:35 pm Hit on Asuka LIKE A BOSS. Get rejected LIKE A BOSS http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DZlip0VXpRw The funny thing is, it fits so well it's cary.

[]: Re: Shinji is THE BOSS             Quote Post by Tankred » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:49 pm Grimmjow wrote: Hit on Asuka LIKE A BOSS. Get rejected LIKE A BOSS http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DZlip0VXpRw The funny thing is, it fits so well it's cary.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:52 pm Somehow I was expecting something a little more Metal Gear Solid -y.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Thu Mar 31, 2011 1:55 pm Jesus christ that is awesome, usually I have no patience for lolwacky anime amvs but that ones just great.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Mar 31, 2011 3:13 pm SUCK A DUDE´S DICK SCORE SOME COKE

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Mar 31, 2011 3:37 pm CRASH MY CAR! SUCK MY OWN DICK! EAT SOME CHICKEN STRIPS! I'm laughing so hard I'm having trouble breathing, that was pure win right there.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 3:40 pm This is the best thing I've seen all day.

[]:             Quote Post by zuka » Thu Mar 31, 2011 4:06 pm I laughed until I cried. Highlights - suck a dude's dick, eat some chicken strips Meet a giant fish, fuck its brains out That is so so awesome

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Thu Mar 31, 2011 4:16 pm WHO SAID WE'RE WACK!?

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Thu Mar 31, 2011 4:39 pm Lest we forget: Not only is Shinji the boss, he is also The Man .

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Thu Mar 31, 2011 4:52 pm That just improved my boring day ten-fold. Thanks for that. Also: Whenever someone starts bashing Eva, I'll just send them that vid tankred posted and just leave it at that.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Mar 31, 2011 5:19 pm It fits Shinji's personality really well.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Mar 31, 2011 7:30 pm Pure win and awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Thu Mar 31, 2011 8:00 pm Favorite'd the video. LIKE A BOSS

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 31, 2011 8:33 pm I'm going to go against the flow here and say that, even after watching the original for cultural context, the only part that got me to crack a smile was when the interviewer said, "I think at one point there(...)". I wonder if this is one of those things that requires continued bombardment and social reinforcement to appreciate, or whatever.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Thu Mar 31, 2011 8:37 pm Reichu wrote: I wonder if this is one of those things that requires continued bombardment and social reinforcement to appreciate, or whatever.

[]:             Quote Post by Spud » Thu Mar 31, 2011 8:40 pm That was full of win on many different levels

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Thu Mar 31, 2011 8:57 pm I think that it's wack, to call someone wack! Ah, are there any more of these comedic AMV's? Here's one , remember it from AMV Hell 4

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 31, 2011 9:27 pm Tankred wrote: Here's one , remember it from AMV Hell 4

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Mar 31, 2011 9:29 pm reichu is funny, talented and makes good jokes. LIKE A BOSS that works better
